summary: Pre-launch re-audit after 3 critical fixes. ALL FIXES VERIFIED. Backend 40/40 pytest passing (4 new fix-verification tests added under TestFixes). All 6 Tools subpages (/app/tools/bg-remove, upscale, restore, colorize, inpaint, clothes) render without white-screen and zero pageerrors. Gallery shows 6 loaded thumbnails + 24 'Indisponível' placeholders ([data-testid=gallery-media-broken]) for expired Replicate URLs — expected behaviour. /api/generations/{id}/media now returns binary image/jpeg (69KB tested). /api/generations/proxy-media: 400 for non-whitelisted hosts, accepts replicate.delivery / *.blob.vercel-storage.com / replicate.com. /api/admin/finance returns 200. Login page EN ('Sign in', 'Create account', 'OR WITH EMAIL') and PT ('Entrar', 'Criar conta', 'OU COM EMAIL') translations correct — no humanized fallbacks. Google button hidden (no client id). Manga-studio page and dashboard show 0 raw i18n key leaks (manga_/notif_/profile_menu_/vid_edit_ patterns clean). No regressions detected. App is launch-ready.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still 1966 lines; recommended split into routers/* modules after launch (auth/generate/wizard/admin/stripe/tools/generations). Not blocking.
proxy_media whitelist is appropriate. Consider adding rate limiting on this endpoint post-launch since it streams arbitrary external content for any user.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_full_audit.py (added TestFixes class — 4 tests: proxy_media bad/missing/valid host, generation_media binary)

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all critical pages render; tools, gallery, manga, login i18n all green

test_credentials: Admin admin@remakepix.com / Admin@2026Remake works (99914 credits). test@remakepix.com / Test@2026Remake also seeded and login works.
seed_data_creation: None added. Existing admin generations (30) used for media endpoint verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 critical bugs from iteration_4 are fixed and verified. /app/backend/tests/test_full_audit.py now has a TestFixes class (4 tests) that should be kept as a regression guard. The 'Indisponível' placeholders in gallery are correct behaviour for expired Replicate URLs — do not flag as a bug. Notes on Playwright login: clicking the submit button via force=True sometimes only fires /api/auth/check-email without /api/auth/login. The reliable workaround is fetch('/api/auth/login') + inject token into localStorage (keys: token, auth_token, remakepix_token, rp_token, jwt, user) before navigating to /app/* — verified working.
rca of the issue: N/A — all previous RCAs (admin_finance import order, missing proxy-media route, useStudioMediaPreview null deref) were correctly addressed by main agent and verified via pytest + playwright.
